## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify the context of previous Supabase-GrowthX interactions and explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is using Supabase on a small scale ($25/month pro plan), but the extent and purpose are unclear](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-driven content marketing services, focusing on SEO and AI search optimization](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in further discussions: Supabase to understand GrowthX's usage, GrowthX to explore potential Supabase applications](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)

## Topics

### Supabase Usage by GrowthX

  - [GrowthX currently uses Supabase on a $25/month pro plan](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Usage appears small-scale, primarily utilizing the database and 1-2 other features](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Exact purpose and extent of use are unknown, possibly for proof of concept or small projects](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Marcel (GrowthX CEO) uses Supabase personally, but details are unclear](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)

### GrowthX Services Overview

  - [End-to-end agency partner for content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Focus on AI-driven content creation and optimization for AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Services include SEO/GEO strategy, content creation, CMS management, and LLM analytics](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Utilizes sophisticated AI workflows to publish relevant content daily](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Emphasizes fact-checking and accuracy in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Targets marketing teams and go-to-market segments](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Supabase interested in learning about new use cases, especially non-technical users leveraging tools like Lovable](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [GrowthX developing apps for LLM visibility and analytics, which could potentially use Supabase](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Supabase curious about GrowthX's relationship with Lovable (a GrowthX client) and potential synergies](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### Contact Points and Next Steps

  - [Tyler to discuss Supabase with Marcel (GrowthX CEO) and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Hayden to reach out to Craig and Prashant at Supabase regarding potential interest in GrowthX services](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [Both parties open to connecting relevant team members for further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to update Hayden after speaking with Marcel about Supabase interest/usage](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [Hayden to follow up with Craig and Prashant at Supabase regarding potential interest in GrowthX services](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)
  - [Both parties to facilitate introductions between relevant team members if there's mutual interest](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up calls or meetings based on the outcomes of internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/ECkb6_Bc9QzVvkLX8mPyvqizqnCaEEGf?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
